prompt_package.title: ancient_cliffside_cave Environment Reference - Establishing Wide
prompt_package.purpose: Prepare a compact environment reference prompt for enhancer-safe generation.
prompt_package.positive_prompt: If this prompt is later used with an image reference, treat image1 as the locked spatial reference. Environment reference sheet, wide establishing reference with clear horizon, depth, and geography, A large, ancient subterranean chamber accessed via a narrow entrance on a high, precarious cliffside trail., Transition from bright exterior sunlight to deep,..., high quality, clean environment reference, balanced lighting, sharp environmental detail
prompt_package.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, subtitle, caption, signature, low quality, blurry, out of focus, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate faces, cropped head, bad hands, messy composition, underexposed, overexposed, text, watermark

inputs.composition_lock: preserve canonical identity and framing rules
inputs.layout_descriptor: A large, ancient subterranean chamber accessed via a narrow entrance on a high, precarious cliffside trail.
inputs.lighting_descriptor: Transition from bright exterior sunlight to deep, oppressive interior shadows; heavy, unnatural stillness; dim, diffused light filtering through the entrance; sense of overwhelming drowsiness/stagnant air.
inputs.mood_descriptor: Transition from bright exterior sunlight to deep, oppressive interior shadows; heavy, unnatural stillness; dim, diffused light filtering through the entrance; sense of overwhelming drowsiness/stagnant air.

continuity_notes: Preserve geographic layout, scale, lighting, and recurring anchors.
If this prompt is later used with an image reference, treat image1 as the locked spatial reference.
Keep the prompt compact enough for ComfyUI text prompt enhancers to expand safely.
Avoid proper nouns in the prompt body unless text is meant to appear on screen.
